content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "NIFTY -1.08%, BANKNIFTY -1.08%, AUTO -1.90%, REALTY -1.86%, PSU BANK -1.51% — broad risk-off with VIX +10% to 18.59. IT relatively flat and FMCG defensives holding up. Book is 65% deployed with 15 CNC names; +0.66% unrealized today. Priority is trailing SLs on winners (PNBHOUSING +10%, COFORGE +8.5%) and respecting existing SLs on laggards rather than new admits in a -1% tape.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1073.10,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+10% unrealized, stored SL 1073.10 already at +9% above entry — locked in. Trail-gap to CMP 1082.20 is ~0.85% which is below the 1% floor; keeping SL where it is rather than tighten further (would force same-session exit on noise). No-op MODIFY avoided — actually emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1073.10 already locks in +9% gain. CMP 1082.20, trail-gap <1% — cannot tighten further without violating Rule trail-gap floor. Target 1135 ~5% away; let it run. Brokerage targets Rs 1,350 imply more upside but recent 30% run reduces margin of safety, so SL stays where it is."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.1% unrealized, SL 121 intact. VIX +10% and geopolitical risk premium supports gold thesis. Hold to target 135."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.8% gain, stored SL at entry 820. CMP 835, raising SL to 825 (+0.6% from entry, lockin) — gap to CMP ~1.2%, respects trail-gap floor. Q4 beat, FMCG rotation on, target 855 only ~2.4% away."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+8.5% unrealized, stored SL 1352 already locks in +7.4%. CMP 1366.30, trail-gap ~1.05% — at the floor; cannot tighten further without forcing exit on noise. IT defensive tailwind + Q4 beat support holding to target 1420."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.2% unrealized, CMP 2988.90 just below SL 3000. The SL is the calibrated max loss — let it work. If hit, that's the plan. Defence cluster intact, HAL results May 13 could lift sector. Rule 17: do NOT front-run my own SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.6% unrealized. Stored SL is already at 820 (above entry 806 = locked +1.7%). CMP 826.70, gap to SL ~0.8% — actually below trail-gap floor. This is a no-op — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.3% unrealized, SL 1465 intact (CMP 1455.10 sitting near/at SL). Q4 was strong (+37% PAT), thesis intact. SL will do its job if hit. Rule 17 — no panic exit."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.4%, SL 1580 intact. Research flagged NEUTRAL with -0.05 modifier and post-result distribution selling — watching closely but not exiting on intact SL. Will reassess if next session shows continued weakness."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5%, SL 2755 intact. Q4 PAT +11%, FY26 +47% — thesis healthy. Let SL work."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.6%, SL 9020 intact. Q4 record revenue, 30% market share. Cables breakout intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.9%, SL 1955 intact. Q4 ex-charge operations healthy, defense order book Rs 10,961 cr. Auto sector -1.9% today is a headwind but SL absorbs it."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.6%, CMP 355.05 just above SL 354. Q4 PAT +30.6%, Macquarie target 415. Banking sector weak today but SL is the calibrated stop — let it work. Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.1%, SL 10440 intact (CMP 10536). Q4 PAT +34%, ₹5,633 Cr buyback at ₹12,000, dividend ₹150. Auto sector -1.9% but thesis is differentiated by buyback floor. Hold to SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.9%, SL 472 intact. Q4 beat, FMCG rotation on (+3.77% pre-market). Thesis intact, hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.5%, SL 1190 intact. Q4 results pending in May = binary event within 3 sessions per Rule 11 — but position is small (~₹19.6K, ~2% capital) so falls within event-trade size cap. Holding through with stored SL."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at +9% lockin; trail-gap to CMP <1% prevents further tightening without forced exit risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "VIX spike supports gold safe-haven thesis. SL intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "reasoning": "Raise SL from entry 820 to 825 to lock small gain on Q4 beat + FMCG rotation tailwind."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1352 already locks +7.4%. Trail-gap at floor; further tighten would force same-session exit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 3000 is the plan; do not front-run. Defense cluster intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 820 already locks small gain; gap to CMP <1% prevents further tighten."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong, thesis intact, SL 1465 does its job if hit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Watching distribution-selling flag but SL 1580 intact; small unrealized gain."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 healthy, SL intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 record, cables theme intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL intact, defense order book supports."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 +30.6% PAT, broker targets ₹415. SL 354 is the plan."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Buyback at ₹12,000 provides structural floor; SL 10440 absorbs auto weakness."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "FMCG rotation tailwind, Q4 beat. SL intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 pending — small size acceptable as event-trade. SL 1190 intact."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BULLISH-rated candidates evaluated for new admits at 09:20 with NIFTY -1.08%, VIX +10%, broad risk-off: NBCC (+0.12 modifier, ₹252 cr Odisha order win — interesting but PSU construction in -1% tape is mid-quality entry, watch for afternoon dip toward 95-96 support before entry); BAJAJ-AUTO (+0.15 already held); BHARATFORG (+0.08 already held); POLYCAB (+0.10 already held); DABUR (+0.12 already held); CAMS (+0.10 already held); ABCAPITAL (+0.12 already held); PIDILITIND (+0.10 already held); GRSE (+0.10 already held). Most of the high-modifier names are already in the book. THERMAX (+11.84% gap), NUVAMA (+10.65%), CRAFTSMAN (15x volume), CARTRADE (7.5x volume) — no deep-data delivered or volumes alone are not setups; skipping. APOLLOHOSP/TITAN/BERGEPAINT/HCLTECH/INFY/PERSISTENT/SUNPHARMA not actioned — risk-off morning, prefer to manage existing book first and let the tape define support. Trigger for new admit later in session: NBCC dip to 96-97 with sustained volume, OR clear NIFTY recovery above 24050.",
  "portfolio_notes": "65% deployed (₹653K of ₹1.005M), ₹351K cash. 15 holdings already span Financial Services (PNBHOUSING/CAMS/ABCAPITAL), FMCG (MARICO/DABUR), IT (COFORGE), Defense/Capital Goods (GRSE/POLYCAB/BHARATFORG), Chemicals (PIDILITIND/SRF), Healthcare (WOCKPHARMA/LAURUSLABS), Auto (BAJAJ-AUTO), Gold (GOLDBEES). Good diversification. On a -1% NIFTY day with VIX +10%, the right posture is defense first — let SLs do their work on the laggards (GRSE/ABCAPITAL/BAJAJ-AUTO sitting near SLs) and let winners run (PNBHOUSING/COFORGE locked in profit). HFCL OPEN MIS BUY order from 7474m ago (~5 days stale) — this is a stale stuck order, but I cannot CANCEL via the trading_decision schema for orders not tied to a position; flagging in notes. 5-day P&L -₹3,715 with 12% win rate is poor — discipline reset: respect SLs, ride winners, don't churn. No new BUYs this tick; will reassess at 10:30 IST once NIFTY direction clarifies post-opening."
}
